title: Batrachium peucedanifolium
taxonomy: Batrachium peucedanifolium is a species of aquatic plant, and it belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. It is also known as the water crowfoot or river crowfoot. The plant is a type of water crowfoot, which is a group of plants that thrive in freshwater environments. The classification of this plant is further divided into the genus Batrachium and the species peucedanifolium. As a member of the family Ranunculaceae, it shares characteristics with other water crowfoot species.
